subcodes.title: Words spoken at a public park in San Francisco, 1912-10-05
subcodes.first_line: The world and its condition will change to such a degree and the Baha’í Cause will prevail to such an extent that nothing but a remnant -- like these pillars -- will remain of the previous order.
subcodes.first_line_orig: تغییر اوضاع عالم و غلبه امر بهائی بجائی خواهد رسید که از سایر امور جز نمونه‌ای مانند این عمودها باقی نخواهد ماند
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men
